rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Gov't Code §2155.082 governs comptroller fee-for-service purchasing. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: The comptroller may provide open market purchasing services on a fee-for-service basis for state agency purchases that are delegated to an agency under Section 2155.131, 2155.132, or 2157.121 or that are exempted from the purchasing authority of the comptroller.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption change and this purchasing-services statute.
